hero_desc: Building futures with integrity and international reach through trusted placement of Indonesian manpower into leading global opportunities.
about_title: Raising Global Standards in Professional Placement
about_p1: PT Aida Duta Indonesia Sejahtera is an international recruitment and manpower placement agency dedicated to bridging Indonesia's best talent with global opportunities.
about_p2: Our foundation is built on integrity, transparency, and professional service so every candidate and partner receives a trusted standard of care.
about_hub_desc: International-standard support for recruitment, training, documentation, and placement.
vision_desc: To become a trusted, professional manpower placement company focused on the welfare of Indonesian migrant workers.
mission_1: Provide safe, transparent, and compliant migrant worker placement services.
mission_2: Improve workforce competence through high-quality training.
mission_3: Deliver protection and guidance before, during, and after overseas employment.
mission_4: Build strategic partnerships with overseas companies that use manpower services.
org_director_desc: Leads the company's strategic direction and ensures operations align with the vision, mission, and professional standards.
org_ops_desc: Coordinates recruitment, training, placement, and administration so services run as one integrated process.
org_recruitment_desc: Handles selection, verification, and candidate readiness for migrant workers.
org_training_desc: Manages competence, language, and workplace culture adaptation programs.
org_admin_desc: Oversees documents, permits, and departure administration for workers.
srv1_desc: A standardized screening and placement process to ensure strong competency fit between candidates and employers.
srv2_desc: Training programs designed to strengthen technical skills, soft skills, language ability, and workplace culture readiness.
srv3_desc: Guidance for document preparation, legalization, visa processing, and work permits in line with immigration rules.
sector1_desc: Work in plant care, fertilizing, and harvesting with a structured work system.
sector2_desc: Production operators, packing, sorting, and quality control in disciplined work environments.
sector3_desc: Building, infrastructure, and technical field work in professional project settings.
sector4_desc: Seafood processing, fish farming, and modern fisheries industries.
sector5_desc: Daily care and assistance for elderly people with patience, attention, and compassion.
sector6_desc: Professional household support including cleaning, cooking, laundry, and childcare.
lpk_title: Build Your Career on the Global Stage
lpk_desc: Explore international career opportunities in the most preferred destination countries.
cont_desc: Contact our team to explore trusted international career opportunities or partner with us for your recruitment needs.
cont_add: Jl. Lkr. Bar. Kepanjen, Ngadilangkung, Kepanjen District, Malang Regency, East Java
form_success_desc: Your message has been prepared. Our team will review your inquiry soon.
foot_copy: © 2026 PT Aida Duta Indonesia Sejahtera. All rights reserved.
sector1_detail_desc: The fisheries sector offers opportunities in seafood processing, fish farming, product handling, and modern fisheries operations with international work standards.
sector2_detail_desc: The factory and manufacturing sector suits candidates ready to work in production, assembly, quality control, sorting, and packaging inside structured industrial environments.
sector3_detail_desc: The plantation sector provides opportunities in crop care, fertilizing, harvesting, product handling, and modern agricultural support with a clear work system.
sector3_requirements: Willing to stay near the work area
sector4_detail_desc: The elderly care sector focuses on professional support for seniors, including daily activity assistance, hygiene, mobility, and emotional care.
sector5_detail_desc: The construction sector offers work opportunities in building projects, infrastructure, facility maintenance, and technical field work with guided safety standards.
sector5_requirements: Ready to work in a team
sector6_detail_desc: The domestic worker sector covers professional household services such as cleaning, cooking, laundry, childcare, and support for daily family needs.
